title: Scheduling carrier aggregation (ca)-capable and non-ca-capable user equipments (ues) using a resource bias parameter
abstract: Aspects of the present disclosure provide methods and apparatus for scheduling UEs in a wireless cell. The method generally includes determining one or more characteristics of communications on a first cell for a first type of user equipments (UEs) and a second type of UEs. A cell determines a first set of resources for the first type of UEs and a second set of resources for the second type of UEs based, at least in part, on the determined one or more characteristics and a resource bias parameter. The cell assigns the first set of resources for communications between the first cell and the first type of UEs and the second set of resources for communications between the first cell and the second type of UEs.
claims: Claims 1. A method for wireless communications, comprising: determining one or more characteristics of communications on a first cell for a first type of user equipments (UEs) and a second type of UEs; determining a first set of resources for the first type of UEs and a second set of resources for the second type of UEs based, at least in part, on the determined one or more characteristics and a resource bias parameter; and assigning the first set of resources for communications between the first cell and the first type of UEs and the second set of resources for communications between the first cell and the second type of UEs. 2. The method of claim 1, wherein the first type of UEs comprise UEs capable of communications using carrier aggregation and the second type of UEs comprise UEs not capable of communications using carrier aggregation. 3. The method of claim 1, wherein the one or more characteristics comprise an expected amount of traffic on at least a first cell for the first type of UEs and the second type of UEs. 4. The method of claim 3, wherein calculating the expected amount of traffic for the first type of UEs comprises calculating an expected amount of traffic on each of a plurality of component carriers. 5. The method of claim 1, wherein the one or more characteristics comprise instantaneous channel conditions for the first type of UEs and the second type of UEs. 6. The method of claim 1, wherein the resource bias parameter comprises a network operator-defined value. 7. The method of claim 1, wherein the resource bias parameter is selected based on a ratio of the first type of UEs and the second type of UEs connected to the first cell. 8. The method of claim 1, further comprising determining one or more characteristics of communications on one or more second cells for the first type of UEs and the second type of UEs, wherein determining the first set of resources for the first type of UEs and the second set of resources for the second type of UEs is further based on the determined one or characteristics of communications on the one or more second cells. 9. An apparatus for wireless communications, comprising: a processor configured to: determine one or more characteristics of communications on a first cell for a first type of user equipments (UEs) and a second type of UEs, determine a first set of resources for the first type of UEs and a second set of resources for the second type of UEs based, at least in part, on the determined one or more characteristics and a resource bias parameter, and assign the first set of resources for communications between the first cell and the first type of UEs and the second set of resources for communications between the first cell and the second type of UEs; and a memory coupled to the processor. 10. The apparatus of claim 9, wherein the first type of UEs comprise UEs capable of communications using carrier aggregation and the second type of UEs comprise UEs not capable of communications using carrier aggregation. 1 1. The apparatus of claim 9, wherein the one or more characteristics comprise an expected amount of traffic on at least a first cell for the first type of UEs and the second type of UEs. 12. The apparatus of claim 11, wherein the processor is configured to calculate the expected amount of traffic for the first type of UEs by calculating an expected amount of traffic on each of a plurality of component carriers. 13. The apparatus of claim 9, wherein the one or more characteristics comprise instantaneous channel conditions for the first type of UEs and the second type of UEs. 14. The apparatus of claim 9, wherein the resource bias parameter comprises a network operator-defined value. 15. The apparatus of claim 9, wherein the processor is configured to select the resource bias parameter based on a ratio of the first type of UEs and the second type of UEs connected to the first cell. 16. The apparatus of claim 9, wherein the processor is further configured to determine one or more characteristics of communications on one or more second cells for the first type of UEs and the second type of UEs, and wherein the processor is configured to determine the first set of resources for the first type of UEs and the second set of resources for the second type of UEs further based on the determined one or characteristics of communications on the one or more second cells. 17. An apparatus for wireless communications, comprising: means for determining one or more characteristics of communications on a first cell for a first type of user equipments (UEs) and a second type of UEs; means for determining a first set of resources for the first type of UEs and a second set of resources for the second type of UEs based, at least in part, on the determined one or more characteristics and a resource bias parameter; and means for assigning the first set of resources for communications between the first cell and the first type of UEs and the second set of resources for communications between the first cell and the second type of UEs. 18. The apparatus of claim 17, wherein the first type of UEs comprise UEs capable of communications using carrier aggregation and the second type of UEs comprise UEs not capable of communications using carrier aggregation. 19. The apparatus of claim 17, wherein the one or more characteristics comprise an expected amount of traffic on at least a first cell for the first type of UEs and the second type of UEs. 20. The apparatus of claim 19, further comprising means for calculating the expected amount of traffic for the first type of UEs, and wherein calculating the expected amount of traffic for the first type of UEs comprises calculating an expected amount of traffic on each of a plurality of component carriers. 21. The apparatus of claim 17, wherein the one or more characteristics comprise instantaneous channel conditions for the first type of UEs and the second type of UEs. 22. The apparatus of claim 17, wherein the resource bias parameter comprises a network operator-defined value. 23. The apparatus of claim 17, further comprising means for selecting the resource bias parameter, wherein the bias parameter is selected based on a ratio of the first type of UEs and the second type of UEs connected to the first cell. 24. The apparatus of claim 17, further comprising means for determining one or more characteristics of communications on one or more second cells for the first type of UEs and the second type of UEs, wherein determining the first set of resources for the first type of UEs and the second set of resources for the second type of UEs is further based on the determined one or characteristics of communications on the one or more second cells. 25. A computer-readable medium having instructions stored thereon which, when executed by a processor, performs an operation, the operation comprising: determining one or more characteristics of communications on a first cell for a first type of user equipments (UEs) and a second type of UEs; determining a first set of resources for the first type of UEs and a second set of resources for the second type of UEs based, at least in part, on the determined one or more characteristics and a resource bias parameter; and assigning the first set of resources for communications between the first cell and the first type of UEs and the second set of resources for communications between the first cell and the second type of UEs.
